name: ACTIVATED transaction is canceled and reaches CANCELED status

steps.name: Given the eCommerce CDC environment variables are configured
Given a random CDC notice code is generated
When I create a CDC transaction with a static order id
And I delete the CDC transaction
Then the CDC response has status code 202
And the transaction status reaches "CANCELED" via polling

fullName: eCommerce CDC service — Integration tests: ACTIVATED transaction is canceled and reaches CANCELED status
